summary: Iteration 8 testing completed. All 9 requested features verified and working. Backend tests 10/10 passed. Frontend RBAC and Dashboard metrics working correctly. Country filter visible in audit logs. All 35 simulation templates (7 types × 5 each) seeded and displayed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features implemented and tested: User Import V2 (auto-password), 7 new simulation types with 35 templates, Dashboard showing scenario_types breakdown, Inquiries API secured to super_admin only, Sidebar RBAC working correctly

details: Template has 4 columns: name, email, role, organization_name
Welcome emails sent with auto-generated credentials
Types include: phishing_email, malicious_ads, social_engineering, qr_code_phishing, usb_drop, mfa_fatigue, bec_scenario, data_handling_trap, ransomware_readiness, shadow_it_detection
scenario_types breakdown shows 7 new types with 5 each
Dashboard UI shows 'Simulation Templates by Type' section
All 7 new types displayed with counts: BEC(5), QR(5), MFA(5), USB(5), DataHandling(5), Ransomware(5), ShadowIT(5)
org_admin sidebar correctly hides: Access Requests, Settings, Organizations (nav), Content section, Cert Templates, Certificates, Simulations section (nav items)
org_admin can see: Dashboard, Analytics, Advanced Analytics, Users, Import Users, My Training
super_admin sidebar shows ALL sections: OVERVIEW, MANAGEMENT, SIMULATIONS, CONTENT, TRAINING, SETTINGS, SECURITY
All Simulation items (Phishing Sim, Ad Simulation, Scenarios) visible
Country filter present in Audit Logs filters
Audit logs table shows Country column
Role-Based Access Control info card visible
